app.title: Ghostel.el: Terminal emulator powered by libghostty
app.author: signa11
app.description: A minimal terminal emulator for Emacs
proposed_tests: Install Emacs from source, test rendering of simple ascii art
Create a virtual framebuffer, test window resize, close, recreate
Check font rendering and rendering of complex fonts
Compare performance vs a native terminal
